signals.headline: Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in Western Conference First Round After Game 2 Win; No Conference Semifinals Matchup or Raptors
signals.raw:
Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in Western Conference First Round After Game 2 Win; No Conference Semifinals Matchup or Raptors Involvement Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

Lakers secured a 101-94 victory in Game 2 on Tuesday, April 21, taking a 2-0 series lead over the Houston Rockets in the first round, with LeBron James scoring 28 points and Rui Hachimura adding 13 in 43 minutes[3].
